question: Implement a `Counter` class with an integer count. Overload both the prefix `++` and postfix `++` operators for this class to increment the counter value.

test_cases.expected:
Test 1: Prefix basic
Before ++c1: 10
After ++c1: 11
Ref value: 11
c1 == ref_c1: true
---
Test 2: Postfix basic
Before c2++: 20
After c2++ (c2): 21
Value returned by c2++: 20
---
Test 3: Chained prefix
Before ++(++c3): 30
After ++(++c3): 32
Ref value: 32
c3 == ref_c3: true
---
Test 4: Assignment with postfix
Before val = c4++: 40
After val = c4++ (c4): 41
val4 (returned value): 40
---
Test 5: Assignment with prefix
Before val = ++c5: 50
After val = ++c5 (c5): 51
val5 (returned value): 51
